title: January Dividend Kings And Princes: 3 Buys And 2 To Watch
text: "There is only one-criterion to be included among the Dividend Kings: a publicly-traded company must increase its total fiscal-year dividend-payout for a minimum of 50 consecutive-years." - Dogs of the Dow. The 41 Dividend Kings and 2 Princes (next in line for kingship) (K&P) screened as of December 28, 2022, represented ten of eleven Morningstar Sectors. Broker targeted-top-ten net-gainers ranged 9.61%-20.75%.

title: Revisiting Parker-Hannifin And My Long Position - It's Now A 'Buy'
text: I went cold on Parker Hannifin in my last piece, calling the company overvalued and too much of a risk at the time in the market, despite recovering from dipping. In this article, I'm revisiting Parker-Hannifin to see what we have going for us as the company has underperformed the market.

title: Parker-Hannifin Remains Highly Attractive
text: PH has grown its dividend for 66 consecutive years. Despite exceptionally strong business headwinds this year, PH is on track to grow its earnings per share to a new all-time high this year.

title: PH vs. NDSN: Which Stock Should Value Investors Buy Now?
text: PH vs. NDSN: Which Stock Is the Better Value Option?
